pkgmetadata.longdescription: [[PyPI version](httpsbadge.fury.iopyjapanize-matplotlib.svg)](httpsbadge.fury.iopyjapanize-matplotlib) japanize-matplotlibmatplotlib matplotlibimportjapanize_matplotlibimportpythonimport matplotlib.pyplot as pltimport japanize_matplotlibplt.plot([1, 2, 3, 4])plt.xlabel()plt.show()[demo](httpsraw.githubusercontent.comuehara1414japanize-matplotlibmasterdemo.pngtokenAOnChuZIQchUxiL0U8qlW633FM-RMSuvks5bxW8zwA3D3D demo) sh pipenvpipenv install japanize-matplotlib pippip install japanize-matplotlib IPAIPAex(Ver.003.01)[IPAv1.0](httpsgithub.comuehara1414japanize-matplotlibblobmasterjapanize_matplotlibfontsIPA_Font_License_Agreement_v1.0.txt) FAQ import japanize_matplotlib [1](httpsgithub.comuehara1414japanize-matplotlibissues1)import japanize_matplotlib matplotlib seaborn sns.set() seaborn sns.set(fontIPAexGothic) IPAexGothic japanize_matplotlib.japanize() import japanize_matplotlib.japanize() import noqa japanize-matplotlib import japanize_matplotlib import
